---
title: Gene annotation pipeline |  `r format(Sys.time(), '%m.%d.%Y')`
author: "Rebecca Spanner"
output:
    rmdformats::readthedown:
    code_folding: hide
    self_contained: true
    number_sections: False
    highlight: pygments
---
  
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
<style type="text/css">
  
  body{ /* Normal  */
      font-size: 14px;
  }
td {  /* Table  */
    font-size: 8px;
}
h1 { /* Header 1 */
    font-size: 28px;
  color: DarkBlue;
}
h2 { /* Header 2 */
    font-size: 20px;
  color: DarkBlue;
}
h3 { /* Header 3 */
    font-size: 16px;
  color: DarkBlue;
}
code.r{ /* Code block */
    font-size: 12px;
}
pre { /* Code block */
    font-size: 12px
}
</style>
  
#1. Trimming of raw Illumina RNAseq reads (if available)

```{Trimming RNAseq reads, eval=FALSE}
#load trimmomatic module/conda environment/add path to trimmomatic java file
#module load trimmomatic#!/bin/bash -l
#SBATCH --job-name=trim-seqs
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --ntasks=32
#SBATCH --mem=40GB
#SBATCH --time=48:00:00
#SBATCH --mail-user=spann057@umn.edu
#SBATCH --mail-type=END

#if have diploid assemblies in folder --- there are 10 Puccinia hordei isolates
ls *diploidassembly.fasta | sed 's/_diploidassembly.fasta//' > isolates.txt

#to submit: sbatch -a 0-9 --export INPUTLIST="isolates.txt" trim-seqs.sh
module load java/openjdk-17.0.2

#change folders to where paired-end RNAseq raw reads lie
#cd /path/to/illumina/reads/ 

#put path to trimmomatic
if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
       java -jar /scratch.global/spann057/wheat_stem_rust/trimmomatic/classes/trimmomatic.jar PE -phred33 ${SAMPLES[i]}_1.fastq.gz ${SAMPLES[i]}_2.fastq.gz ${SAMPLES[i]}_forward_paired.fastq.gz ${SAMPLES[i]}_forward_unpaired.fastq.gz ${SAMPLES[i]}_reverse_paired.fastq.gz ${SAMPLES[i]}_reverse_unpaired.fastq.gz ILLUMINACLIP:TruSeq3-PE.fa:2:30:10 LEADING:3 TRAILING:3 SLIDINGWINDOW:4:15 MINLEN:36
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi
```  
  
#2. Soft masking of repeat sequences 
  
```{bash repeat masking, eval=FALSE}
#get RepeatModeler libraries if do not have already
#!/usr/bin/env bash
#SBATCH --time=48:00:00
#SBATCH --job-name=repeat-annotation
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=32
#SBATCH --mem=40G
#SBATCH --mail-user=spann057@umn.edu
#SBATCH --mail-type=END
ls *fasta > files.txt
#includes diploid, haploid, unplaced

#to submit: sbatch -a 0-39 --export INPUTLIST="files.txt" repeatmasker.sh
module load repeatmodeler/2.0.1
module load repeatmasker/4.1.1

if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
        BuildDatabase -name ${SAMPLES[i]}_db ${SAMPLES[i]}
        RepeatModeler -database ${SAMPLES[i]}_db -LTRStruct
        RepeatMasker -s -nolow -xsmall -lib ${SAMPLES[i]}_db-families.fa -dir ${SAMPLES[i]}_repeatmasker_softmasked ${SAMPLES[i]}
        #mv ${SAMPLES[i]}_repeatmasker_softmasked/${SAMPLES[i]}.masked ${SAMPLES[i]}_softmasked.fasta
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi
```

#3. Align raw reads to genome

```{bash hisat2, eval=FALSE}
#load hisat2 aligner to align illumina paired end reads to assemblies
##make sure in same folder as the masked assemblies *masked.fasta

#make list of reference genomes to align to
ls *softmasked.fasta > refs.txt

#make list of read identifiers
ls *paired.fastq.gz | sed 's/_R1_paired.fastq.gz//' | sed 's/_R2_paired.fastq.gz//' | sort -u > reads.txt


#!/bin/bash -l
#SBATCH --job-name=align-rnaseq-ph
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --mem=40G
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=16
#SBATCH --time=48:00:00
#SBATCH --mail-type=FAIL

#sbatch -a 0-9 --export INPUTLIST="refs.txt" align-rnaseq-ph.sh

module load conda
if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID

        LIST=($(cut -f 1 reads.txt))
        ##
        module load hisat2
        hisat2-build ${SAMPLES[i]} ${SAMPLES[i]}_genome
        for f in ${LIST[@]};do hisat2 --max-intronlen 3000 --dta --no-unal -x ${SAMPLES[i]}_genome -1 ${f}_R1_paired.fastq.gz -2 ${f}_R2_paired.fastq.gz -S ${SAMPLES[i]}_${f}.sam;done
        module load samtools
        #samtools sort
        for f in ${LIST[@]};do samtools view -b ${SAMPLES[i]}_${f}.sam | samtools sort - -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_${f}_sorted.bam;done
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi

```

#4. Merge sorted alignment files and use stringtie to compile alignments into a single non-redundant transcript annotation file
```{merge sorted bam files - samtools merge}
#merge all for diploid, haploid, and unplaced
##then merge separately for spores and infection transcripts - diploid, haploid, and unplaced
#!/bin/bash -l
#SBATCH --job-name=merge-bams
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --mem=40G
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=16
#SBATCH --time=48:00:00
#SBATCH --mail-type=FAIL

#sbatch -a 0-4 --export INPUTLIST="list.txt" merge-bams.sh

module load conda
if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID

        LIST=($(cut -f 1 samples.txt))
        #module load hisat2
        #hisat2-build ${SAMPLES[i]}.fasta ${SAMPLES[i]}_genome
        #for f in ${LIST[@]};do hisat2 --max-intronlen 3000 --dta --no-unal -x ${SAMPLES[i]}_genome -1 ${f}_R1_paired.fastq.gz -2 ${f}_R2_paired.fastq.gz -S ${SAMPLES[i]}_${f}_this.sam;done
        module load samtools
        samtools merge -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_5DPI_merged.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_Painter82_5DPI_1_sorted.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_Painter82_5DPI_2_sorted.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_Painter82_5DPI_3_sorted.bam
        samtools merge -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_7DPI_merged.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_Painter82_7DPI_1_sorted.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_Painter82_7DPI_2_sorted.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_Painter82_7DPI_3_sorted.bam
        samtools merge -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_spores_merged.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_Painter82_spores_1_sorted.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_Painter82_spores_2_sorted.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_Painter82_spores_3_sorted.bam
        samtools merge -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_infection_merged.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_5DPI_merged.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_7DPI_merged.bam
        samtools merge -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_transcripts_merged.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_infection_merged.bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_spores_merged.bam
        #samtools sort
        
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi

```

#5. Use Trinity to perform genome-guided assembly of transcripts - run using singularity image

```{trinity assembler, eval=FALSE}
#trinity singularity image - load this and run
#SBATCH --time=72:00:00
#SBATCH --job-name=assemble-trinity-singularity
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=32
#SBATCH --mem=100GB

#use merged alignment files (from samtools merge) as input for Trinity

#to submit: sbatch -a 0-9 --export INPUTLIST="isolates.txt" trinity-assemble-sing.sh

if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
        module load singularity
        #export PATH=$PATH:/scratch.global/spann057/barley_leaf_rust/pangenome/gene-annotation/bowtie
        singularity exec -e trinityrnaseq.v2.15.1.simg Trinity --genome_guided_bam ${SAMPLES[i]}_transcripts_merged.bam --max_memory 100G --genome_guided_max_intron 3000 --CPU 6 --jaccard_clip --output ${SAMPLES[i]}_Trinity_singularity
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi

```

#6. Use Stringtie for transcriptome assembly and merge transcripts, then run CodingQuarry on separate spore and infection transcripts (and use to extract ORFs later)
```{stringtie, eval=FALSE}
#!/bin/bash -l
#SBATCH --job-name=align-rnaseq-ph
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --mem=40G
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=16
#SBATCH --time=48:00:00
#SBATCH --mail-type=FAIL

#sbatch -a 0-39 --export INPUTLIST="refs.txt" stringtie-codingquarry.sh

module load conda
if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
        #use stringtie and merge these........per sample
        #merge replicates
        module load stringtie
        stringtie -s1 -m50 ${SAMPLES[i]}_spores_merged.bam -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_spores
        stringtie -s1 -m50 ${SAMPLES[i]}_infection_merged.bam -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_infection     
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi


```

#7. Use CodingQuarry - Hidden Markov Model gene prediction with reference genome and transcript annotation file made after RNAseq alignment (e.g. Stringtie output- convert to gff3)
```{CodingQuarry get gene models for use in Funannotate gene prediction, use othergff input}
##could run CodingQuarry using a singularity image
#singularity pull shub://TomHarrop/funannotate-singularity:funannotate_1.7.4
#!/bin/bash -l
#SBATCH --job-name=infect-codingquarry
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --mem=80G
#SBATCH --tmp=80G
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=32
#SBATCH --time=72:00:00
#SBATCH --mail-type=FAIL

#sbatch -a 0-9 --export INPUTLIST="refs.txt" coding-quarry-infection.sh
if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
        module load conda
        source activate agat
        agat_convert_sp_gff2gtf.pl --gtf ${SAMPLES[i]}_infection.gtf -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_infection.gff3
        agat_convert_sp_gff2gtf.pl --gtf ${SAMPLES[i]}_spores.gtf -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_spores.gff3
        QUARRY_PATH="/scratch.global/spann057/secreted/CodingQuarry_v1.2/QuarryFiles"
        mkdir /scratch.global/spann057/secreted/codingquarry-out-infection-${SAMPLES[i]}
        cd /scratch.global/spann057/secreted/codingquarry-out-infection-${SAMPLES[i]}
        /scratch.global/spann057/secreted/CodingQuarry_v1.2/CodingQuarry -f /scratch.global/spann057/secreted/${SAMPLES[i]}_softmasked_deduped.fasta -t /scratch.global/spann057/secreted/${SAMPLES[i]}_infection.gff3
        mkdir /scratch.global/spann057/secreted/codingquarry-out-spores-${SAMPLES[i]}
        cd /scratch.global/spann057/secreted/codingquarry-out-spores-${SAMPLES[i]}
        /scratch.global/spann057/secreted/CodingQuarry_v1.2/CodingQuarry -f /scratch.global/spann057/secreted/${SAMPLES[i]}_softmasked_deduped.fasta -t /scratch.global/spann057/secreted/${SAMPLES[i]}_spores.gff3
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi

#!/bin/bash -l
#SBATCH --job-name=codingquarry-merge
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --mem=80G
#SBATCH --tmp=80G
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=32
#SBATCH --time=72:00:00
#SBATCH --mail-type=FAIL

#sbatch -a 0-9 --export INPUTLIST="refs.txt" coding-quarry-infection.sh
if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
        module load conda
        source activate agat
        agat_sp_merge_annotations.pl --gff /codingquarry-out-infection-${SAMPLES[i]}/out/PredictedPass.gff3 --gff /codingquarry-out-infection-${SAMPLES[i]}/out/DubiousSet.gff3 --out ${SAMPLES[i]}_codingquarry_infection.gff3
        agat_sp_merge_annotations.pl --gff /codingquarry-out-spores-${SAMPLES[i]}/out/PredictedPass.gff3 --gff /codingquarry-out-spores-${SAMPLES[i]}/out/DubiousSet.gff3 --out ${SAMPLES[i]}_codingquarry_spores.gff3
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi

```

#7. Run Funannotate 
```{funannotate}
#perform training on funannotate data
#!/bin/bash -l
#SBATCH --job-name=funannotate
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --mem=50G
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=16
#SBATCH --time=24:00:00
#SBATCH --mail-type=FAIL

#sbatch -a 0-9 --export INPUTLIST="isolates.txt" funannotate.sh

if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
        module load funannotate
        funannotate train -i ${SAMPLES[i]}_softmasked.fasta -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_train --left ${SAMPLES[i]}_R1.fastq.gz --right ${SAMPLES[i]}_R2.fastq.gz --trinity ${SAMPLES[i]}_trinity.fasta --jaccard_clip --no_trimmomatic
        funannotate predict -i ${SAMPLES[i]}_softmasked.fasta -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_train --species ustilago --busco_seed_species ustilago --ploidy 2 --optimize_augustus --other_gff ${SAMPLES[i]}_codingquarry_infection.gff3:20 ${SAMPLES[i]}_codingquarry_spores.gff3:2 --weights pasa:10 codingquarry:0 --transcript_evidence pucciniomycotina_ESTs.fasta
        funannotate update -i ${SAMPLES[i]}_train
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi

```

#8. Predicting extra putative small secreted proteins (effectors) and adding to gene annotation
```{extract ORFs}
#first get transcripts from gff3 (annotation file)
#!/bin/bash -l
#SBATCH --job-name=gffread
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --mem=40G
#SBATCH --tmp=40G
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=32
#SBATCH --time=72:00:00
#SBATCH --mail-type=FAIL

#sbatch -a 0-9 --export INPUTLIST="refs.txt" get-transcripts.sh
#first get transcripts from infection annotation- use gffread
if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
        module load conda
        source activate gffread
        gffread -w ${SAMPLES[i]}_transcripts.fasta -g ${SAMPLES[i]}_softmasked.fasta ${SAMPLES[i]}_infection.gtf
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi

#run ORF predictiong
#use transcoder to get long ORFs from StringTie gene annotation
#!/bin/bash -l
#SBATCH --job-name=spores-codingquarry
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --mem=80G
#SBATCH --tmp=80G
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=32
#SBATCH --time=72:00:00
#SBATCH --mail-type=FAIL

#sbatch -a 0-9 --export INPUTLIST="refs.txt" coding-quarry-infection.sh
if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    then
        i=$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID
        module load transdecoder
        TransDecoder.LongOrfs -m50 -t ${SAMPLES[i]}_transcripts.fasta 
        TransDecoder.Predict –single_best_only -t ${SAMPLES[i]}_transcripts.fasta
        util/cdna_alignment_orf_to_genome_orf.pl ${SAMPLES[i]}_transcripts.fasta.transdecoder.gff3 ${SAMPLES[i]}_infection.gff3 ${SAMPLES[i]}_transcripts.fasta > ${SAMPLES[i]}_transcripts.fasta.transdecoder.genome.gff3
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi
#predict secretion signals and transmembrane domains - filter gene annotation to keep genes with secretion signal and lacking transmembrane domains
#!/bin/bash -l
#SBATCH --job-name=signalp-tm
#SBATCH --nodes=1
#SBATCH --mem=80G
#SBATCH --tmp=80G
#SBATCH --ntasks-per-node=32
#SBATCH --time=72:00:00
#SBATCH --mail-type=FAIL

#sbatch -a 0-9 --export INPUTLIST="refs.txt" signalp-tm.sh
if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    signalp -u 0.34 -U 0.34 ${SAMPLES[i]}_infection_transcripts.fasta.transdecoder.pep -prefix ${SAMPLES[i]}
    cat ${SAMPLES[i]}_infection_transcripts.fasta.transdecoder.pep | tmhmm > ${SAMPLES[i]}_TM.txt
    grep "CS pos:" ${SAMPLES[i]}_signalp_summary.signalp5 | cut -f1 > ${SAMPLES[i]}_secreted.txt
    grep -f ${SAMPLES[i]}_secreted.txt ${SAMPLES[i]}_transcripts.fasta.transdecoder.genome.gff3 > ${SAMPLES[i]}_secreted.gff3
    grep "Number of predicted TMHs:  0" ${SAMPLES[i]}_TM.txt > ${SAMPLES[i]}_noTM.txt
    sed -i -e 's/ Number of predicted TMHs:  0//' ${SAMPLES[i]}_noTM.txt
    sed -i -e 's/[#]//' ${SAMPLES[i]}_noTM.txt
    sed -i -e 's/ //' ${SAMPLES[i]}_noTM.txt
    grep -f ${SAMPLES[i]}_noTM.txt ${SAMPLES[i]}_secreted.gff3 > ${refgenome}_secreted_noTM.gff3
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi

#9. Add extra predicted small secreted protein genes to final gene annotation file and fix gene models

if [ -s "$INPUTLIST" ]
then
    SAMPLES=( $(cut -f 1 $INPUTLIST) );

    if [ ! -z "$SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID" ]
    module load conda
    source activate agat
    agat_sp_merge_annotations.pl --gff ${SAMPLES[i]}_funannotatepredict.gff3 --gff ${SAMPLES[i]}_secreted_noTM.gff3 --out ${SAMPLES[i]}_merged.gff3
    agat_sp_fix_overlaping_genes.pl --gff ${SAMPLES[i]}_merged.gff3 -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_merged_fixed.gff3
    agat_sp_keep_longest_isoform.pl --gff ${SAMPLES[i]}_merged_fixed.gff3 -o ${SAMPLES[i]}_longest_isoform.gff3
    agat_sp_statistics.pl --gff ${SAMPLES[i]}_longest_isoform.gff3 > ${SAMPLES[i]}_longest_statistics.txt
    else
        echo "Error: Missing array index as SLURM_ARRAY_TASK_ID"
    fi
else
    echo "Error: Missing inputs file list as --export env INPUTLIST or file empty"
fi
